description: Weather limits, cold/heat protocols, rain/wind restrictions, humidity effects

cable_pulling.PVC_THHN_minimum: 14F (-10C) per NEC 310.10(H) — manufacturer may specify higher
cable_pulling.cold_cable_rule: Store in heated space 24 hours minimum before pull — cold jacket cracks during bending

concrete.never: Place on frozen ground or against frozen forms

instrument_tubing.bending: SS tubing OK in cold but quality drops below 40F (dexterity)
instrument_tubing.leak_testing: Use dry gas — moisture freezes in tubing
instrument_tubing.hydro_testing: NOT below 32F unless freeze protection in place

thresholds_WBGT.80_85F: Caution — water every 30 min, acclimatize new workers
thresholds_WBGT.85_88F: Increased risk — 15 min rest per hour, buddy system
thresholds_WBGT.88_90F: High risk — 30 min rest per hour, limit strenuous work
thresholds_WBGT.above_90F: Extreme — consider stopping or 45 min rest per hour

heat_stress.new_worker_acclimatization: 20% workload Day 1, increase 20% per day over 5 days
heat_stress.water_requirement: 1 quart per hour per worker minimum
heat_stress.schedule: Start early 5-6 AM, extended lunch during peak 11 AM - 2 PM

must_stop: Crane lifts in lightning (stop when lightning within 10 miles, resume 30 min after last strike)
Working on wet steel at elevation
can_continue: Planning and material staging under cover

wind_restrictions.light_materials: Secure or stop handling above 20 mph
wind_restrictions.note: Measure wind at working height, not ground level

megger_testing.condensation: Do NOT test — water film gives meaningless readings
megger_testing.mitigation: Test early morning, use dehumidifiers, warm equipment above dew point

humidity_effects_on_testing.hipot: Even more sensitive than megger — generally requires below 70% humidity
humidity_effects_on_testing.rule: Always record temperature AND humidity with insulation test results
